backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Mitsubishi dealership backend, defining all data stores (vehicles, variants, colors, blog posts, promotions, testimonials, media, visitor stats, etc.), stable state, and type definitions, while mixing in storage, authorization, and access control modules.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference for the project's frontend architecture and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS file at the frontend root level.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang frontend app, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that configures TanStack Router with all public and admin routes, wraps the app in QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and Toaster providers, and protects admin routes with AuthGuard.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserD: Dialog form component for creating or editing admin users, validating Principal ID format, and submitting create/update mutations with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserL: Table component that displays a list of AdminRecord users with their principal, role badge, creation date, and edit/delete action buttons, disabling delete when only one admin remains.
frontend/src/components/admin/BannerImag: A dialog component that lets admins pick a banner image (main or CTA) from existing media assets, displaying them in a radio-group grid with blob URL previews.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostDi: A dialog form for creating or editing blog posts, with delegation identity token validation before submitting create/update mutations to the backend.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostLi: Displays a table of all blog posts with options to edit, delete, and toggle publish status, using confirmation dialogs for destructive actions.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAsset: Renders a grid of uploaded media assets with blob URL previews, copy-ID, and delete functionality, validating delegation identity and actor readiness before mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaUploa: A drag-and-drop file upload zone supporting images and PDFs up to 10MB, with per-file progress tracking, validation, and identity/actor checks before uploading.
frontend/src/components/admin/PassengerV: A dialog form component for creating or editing a passenger vehicle, with fields for name, description, and base price, using create/update vehicle mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all passenger vehicles with options to edit, delete, and toggle publish status, including a confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/PromoDialo: A dialog form for creating or editing a promotion, with fields for title, description, start date, and end date, using create/update promotion mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all promotions with their period and active status, supporting edit, delete, and active status toggle actions.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: A dialog form for creating or editing a testimonial, with fields for customer name, content, and rating (1–5), using create/update testimonial mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all testimonials showing customer name, content, and star rating, with edit and delete action buttons delegated to parent callbacks.
frontend/src/components/admin/TopPagesCh: Renders a horizontal bar chart showing the top 10 most-visited pages, converting bigint URL/count pairs into Recharts-compatible data with truncated display URLs.
frontend/src/components/admin/VisitorTre: Renders a line chart displaying visitor trends over the last 30 days, converting bigint timestamp/count pairs into date-labeled Recharts data.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that checks Internet Identity delegation validity, syncs or clears the auth token in localStorage, and redirects unauthenticated users to the login page.
frontend/src/components/public/ArtikelTe: Displays a static list of five latest article links that navigate to individual blog post pages using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/public/BottomCTA: Fixed bottom action bar with Call, WhatsApp, credit simulation, and a hamburger menu that opens a navigation dropdown above the bar.
frontend/src/components/public/Commercia: Button-based variant selector for commercial vehicles that tracks the selected variant in local state and notifies the parent via a callback.
frontend/src/components/public/CTABanner: Full-width CTA banner section that loads a configurable banner image from website settings (authenticated users only) and links to WhatsApp using the dealer's contact number.
frontend/src/components/public/Footer.ts: Site footer displaying dealer contact info, social media links, visitor stats (auto-refreshed every 15 seconds), and dynamic settings with fallback defaults.
frontend/src/components/public/HeroSecti: Page hero banner that maps the current pathname to a title, icon, background color, and subtitle, with special styling for Mobil Niaga pages.
frontend/src/components/public/Highlight: Displays a carousel section of up to 8 family car (Mobil Keluarga) vehicle cards fetched from the catalog API, with a loading state.
Displays a carousel section of up to 8 commercial vehicle (Mobil Niaga) cards fetched from the catalog API, with a loading state.
frontend/src/components/public/MainBanne: Renders the hero banner section using a configurable image (loaded from media assets if authenticated, otherwise a static fallback) and displays the site name from website settings.
frontend/src/components/public/Navbar.ts: Sticky navigation bar with the site logo, desktop menu links, and a collapsible mobile menu that closes on outside clicks.
frontend/src/components/public/ProductIn: Renders like and share buttons for a vehicle, tracking counts via the useProductInteractions hook and triggering the native Web Share API when available.
frontend/src/components/public/ProdukUng: Displays a grid of up to 4 featured vehicle cards (Produk Unggulan) fetched from the catalog API, with a loading state.
frontend/src/components/public/SearchPro: Provides a search input that redirects to the Mobil Keluarga page with a query parameter when the user submits a search term.
frontend/src/components/public/SpecialFe: Static section displaying three dealership selling points (flexible installments, low down payment, negotiable price) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/public/TentangKa: Static 'About Us' section with a brief description of Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang as an authorized dealer.
frontend/src/components/public/VariantCo: Interactive selector component allowing users to choose a vehicle variant and color, notifying the parent via a callback when the selection changes.
frontend/src/components/public/VehicleCa: Card component displaying a vehicle's placeholder image, name, formatted base price, and a link to its detail page.
frontend/src/constants/translations.ts: Centralized Indonesian-language label, validation message, and status/action string constants used throughout the frontend.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: React Query hook that fetches admin dashboard statistics from the backend actor; currently returns zeroed default values as the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUsers.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, creating, updating, and deleting admin users via the backend actor, using `protectedCall` for authenticated mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlogPosts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations and publish-toggling on blog posts; all mutation and query functions are stubbed since the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommercialVehicles: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on commercial vehicle categories; all backend calls are stubbed with warnings since the backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Provides a mutation hook for submitting a contact form; the backend call is stubbed and only logs the submitted data.
frontend/src/hooks/useContacts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and deleting contact submissions; both are stubbed since the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreditSimulationFo: Provides a mutation hook for submitting a credit simulation form; the backend call is stubbed and only logs the submitted data.
Provides React Query hooks for fetching and deleting credit simulations; both are stubbed since the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using `@dfinity/auth-client`, exposing login, logout, identity state, and login status to the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaAssets.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, uploading, and deleting media assets via the backend actor, with progress callback support on upload.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductInteraction: Provides React Query hooks for getting and mutating product like/share counts; all backend calls are stubbed, and a combined `useProductInteractions` hook is exported for backward compatibility.
frontend/src/hooks/usePromotions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on promotions (get, create, update, delete, toggle active status), all stubbed out with errors since backend endpoints are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicData.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch all vehicle catalogs and a single vehicle with its catalog, both returning empty/null stubs as the backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a single React Query hook to fetch website settings from the backend actor, returning null on error.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on testimonials (get, create, update, delete), all stubbed out with errors since backend endpoints are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useVehicles.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on vehicles (get all, get by id, create, update, delete, toggle publish, get catalog), all stubbed out as backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorStats.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch visitor stats (active), visitor trend, and page views (both disabled pending backend implementation).
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorTracking.ts: Deprecated React hook for visitor tracking that now does nothing, as tracking has been moved to PublicLayout.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebsiteSettings.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch and update website settings via the backend actor, with protected mutation requiring an authenticated identity.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin panel layout component with a collapsible sidebar navigation, responsive mobile support, click-outside collapse, and a logout handler that clears query cache and redirects to login.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing layout component that wraps pages with Navbar, optional HeroSection, Footer, and BottomCTABar, and handles visitor tracking on each route change via the backend actor.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
Admin page for managing admin users with list, add, edit, and delete functionality using a dialog and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogPage.tsx: Admin page for managing blog articles with add/edit dialog and React Query cache invalidation on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommercialVehic: Placeholder admin page for commercial vehicles that displays a notice directing users to the passenger vehicles menu.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CreditSimulatio: Admin page that fetches and displays a sorted table of visitor credit simulation submissions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardPage.t: Admin dashboard page showing stat cards for vehicles, blog posts, leads, media assets, and visitors using the useAdminStats hook.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsPage.tsx: Admin page that fetches and displays a sorted table of incoming contact/lead submissions from the website.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaManagerPag: Admin page for uploading and browsing media assets, with cache invalidation after successful uploads.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PassengerVehicl: Admin page for managing passenger vehicles with a list view and add/edit dialog.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PromosPage.tsx: Admin page for managing promotions with a list view and add/edit dialog.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsPag: Admin page for managing testimonials with add/edit dialog and a confirmation alert dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/VisitorStatsPag: Admin page that displays real-time visitor statistics (total, daily, weekly, monthly, online now, page views) with auto-refresh every 15 seconds, plus trend and top-pages charts.
frontend/src/pages/admin/WebsiteSettings: Admin page for editing website settings including site name, contact info, social media URLs, and banner images, with form state synced from backend and identity validation on submit.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that handles Internet Identity authentication, syncs auth tokens, and redirects to the admin dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/public/BerandaPage.ts: Public homepage that composes multiple section components: main banner, vehicle highlights, CTA banner, about us, special features, search, featured products, and latest articles.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogDetailPage: Placeholder page for a blog article detail view, currently showing an 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogListPage.t: Placeholder page for the blog listing view, currently showing an 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/KontakPage.tsx: Public contact page with a form collecting name, address, phone, email, vehicle interest, down payment, tenor, and message, submitted via the useContactForm mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaD: Public detail page for a family vehicle, showing image, price, variant/color selector, specs and features tabs, and action buttons for contacting sales or downloading a brochure.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaP: Public listing page for family vehicles, fetching all vehicle catalogs and rendering up to 8 as VehicleCard components in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaCate: Public listing page for commercial vehicles filtered by category slug, rendering up to 8 VehicleCard components with a category heading.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaDeta: Public detail page for a commercial vehicle, showing image, price, variant selector (without color), specs and features tabs, and action buttons for sales contact or brochure download.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaPage: Displays a grid of three commercial vehicle categories (Light Duty, Medium Duty, Tractor Head) as clickable cards that navigate to the respective category route.
frontend/src/pages/public/PromoPage.tsx: Placeholder page for promotions, showing a message that the page is under development.
frontend/src/pages/public/SimulasiKredit: Credit simulation form page that lets users select a vehicle, enter down payment and tenor, calculates estimated monthly installment, and submits the simulation via a mutation hook.
Placeholder page for testimonials, showing a message that the page is under development.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: Defines local TypeScript interfaces for frontend use that mirror backend types, covering entities like Vehicle, Variant, Color, VehicleCatalog, AdminUser, CreditSimulation, and more.
frontend/src/utils/apiClient.ts: Provides a centralized wrapper for ICP canister calls with pre-call authentication validation, authorization error handling, and session management utilities.
frontend/src/utils/blobUrl.ts: Utility functions for converting canister MediaAsset Uint8Array data into browser blob URLs and checking MIME types for images and PDFs.
frontend/src/utils/creditCalculation.ts: Exports a single function that calculates monthly loan installments using an 8% annual interest rate given vehicle price, down payment, and tenor in months.
frontend/src/utils/tokenStorage.ts: Manages persistence of the authenticated Internet Identity principal ID and session expiry in localStorage, with helpers to save, retrieve, validate, and clear session state.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Provides form validation utility functions (required, email, phone, length, numeric, URL) and a `validateDelegationIdentity` function that checks ICP identity validity, including anonymous principal detection and delegation expiration.
frontend/src/utils/visitorTracking.ts: Provides browser-side visitor tracking utilities including session ID generation/persistence, device type detection, browser detection, bot detection, and admin route checking.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for an ICP/Internet Identity app, recording a pending fix request (AR-1) to update `useActor` to create the backend actor using the authenticated identity from `authClient.getIdentity()` instead of an anonymous identity.
